notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for cambodia. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

chunks.title: Chinese passport tourism route for Cambodia
chunks.content: For Chinese ordinary passport holders planning short tourism travel to Cambodia, VIZA AI should consider the official Cambodia tourist eVisa route or tourist visa route at accepted ports. First confirm nationality, stay length, entry port, tourism purpose, passport validity, photo and whether the user will enter by air or land. Check accepted eVisa ports before travel. Keep advice limited to tourism/visitor travel unless the user states work, study, residence, immigration, journalism, volunteering or another regulated purpose.

chunks.title: Cambodia tourist eVisa scope
chunks.content: Cambodia e-Visa is an official electronic visa issued by the Royal Government of Cambodia via the official evisa.gov.kh portal. Tourist e-Visa is normally for tourism, generally single entry, and commonly permits a stay up to 30 days subject to current official rules and accepted entry points. Applicants receive an approval certificate that should be presented with the passport at immigration.

chunks.title: Cambodia documents and entry direction
chunks.content: For Cambodia, collect passport validity, photo, arrival date, entry point, hotel/itinerary, return/onward arrangements and visa type. Warn users to use the official government e-Visa portal, check the accepted ports of entry, and carry the e-Visa approval certificate as required.

documents.title: Cambodia Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: Cambodia application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Cambodia official eVisa portal Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://www.evisa.gov.kh/. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Cambodia fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: identity, passport, nationality, photo, arrival date, entry point, purpose and contact/accommodation details

chunks.title: Cambodia supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: passport biodata, photo, itinerary/accommodation and eVisa approval printout/electronic copy Workflow guardrails: VIZA should separate eligibility check, form filling, document upload, payment and post-approval travel/entry checks. Do not guarantee entry; border authorities make the final decision.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

chunks.title: Official-source field answer norms
chunks.content:
Official-source field answer norms for cambodia.
Use these norms only as filling guidance; if a live official form, passport, or uploaded document shows a more specific value, that document controls the answer.

Crawled source URLs: https://www.evisa.gov.kh/

Passport and identity fields:
- Crawler reached official or authorized source URLs, but did not extract a concise field-specific sentence. Keep this country's field answers constrained to official forms, passport data, and source URLs already listed in the country RAG seed.

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
